subject: Re: re-training a model
body:
Hi Reza,

I agree the current training dialogue is unnecessarily confusing. The 
important/uncertain locations were part of an attempt to imitate the 
training process of BoxNet v1 in v2 (the upgrade was made shortly before 
the public release in June). Unfortunately, the micrograph display UI never 
caught up with this, and there is likely no need for such fine-grained 
control. The options will be removed in 1.0.6. Just providing positive 
examples (if there is a mask for the dirt, it will be considered 
automatically if you choose to train masking as well) of exhaustively 
picked micrographs should be enough.

Cheers,
Dimitry

On Thursday, August 30, 2018 at 10:59:52 PM UTC+2, Reza B wrote:
>
> Hi Dimitry,
>
>
> I'm confused about how to use false positives in retraining. The tutorial 
> states that cleaned up star file goes with "Positive examples", but do I 
> use false positive star files in the "extra important locations"? if so, is 
> there a shortcut for creating a star file for "Uncertain locations" the 
> same way that holding shift creates false positives. Thanks a lot.
>
> Best,
> Reza
>
>
